polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,250 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:

Data: Ethereum dip to $1,250 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 24% (vol $191,761). So low probability of dip, implying bullish for ETH.

Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July: Yes 8% (vol $111,403) low probability, bearish for BTC hitting that high.

Bitcoin reach $67,500 in July: Yes 57% (vol $93,574) moderate probability, somewhat bullish.

Overall sentiment: Mixed? ETH bullish, BTC mixed (one low, one moderate). Probably Mixed.

We need start with "Mixed:" then reasons, mention numbers and names. Max 80 words.

US-Iran Final Nuclear Deal by August 18, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret market sentiment overall. Data: US invade Iran before 2027: Yes 27% (low). No change in Fed rates after July 2026: Yes 93% (high). Fed increase rates 25bps after July 2026: Yes 7% (low). LeBron James to GSW: Yes 10% (low). Mojtaba Khamenei head of state Iran end 2026: Yes 76% (high). Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by July 31: Yes 2% (very low). US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24: Yes 10% (low). US-Iran Final Nuclear Deal by Aug 18 2026: Yes 5% (low).

Interpretation: High confidence in no Fed rate change, high confidence Mojtaba Khamenei will be head of state, low confidence in US invasion, ceasefire, nuclear deal, Kharg Island loss. Mixed? Probably overall sentiment is cautious/bearish regarding geopolitical risk (low chance of invasion, ceasefire, deal) but bullish on US monetary stability and Iranian leadership
